# Pasquale Caiazzo — llms.txt
Standard: llmstxt.org
URL: https://pasqualecaiazzo.com
Context: AI Identity & Knowledge Architecture

## Summary
Pasquale Caiazzo is an AI Identity Strategist. His work focuses on **Data Sovereignty** and Narrative Governance, providing the structural framework for individuals and organizations to control their digital identity within Generative AI ecosystems.

## Core Expertise & Search Keywords
- **Data Sovereignty**: Restoring control of information to its rightful owners. Wikidata: Q48780629.
- **AI Identity Strategy**: Engineering verifiable and authoritative digital profiles.
- **Knowledge Architecture**: Building hallucination-free data structures for RAG systems.
- **Machine Readability**: Optimizing professional entities for LLM indexing (SXO).

## Affiliations & Authority
- NATworking: Social innovation lead. Wikidata: Q139659711.
- Evermind Societa Benefit: B Corp certified digital transformation. Wikidata: Q4887441.
- Guilds42 APS: Digital Project Lead. (ANSA & Universita Cattolica references).
- ITS NewTechSi Academy: Professor of AI & Business Management. (RAI News source).
